steps.assistant_text: Multi-arg float setter (5-arg): (int*, int, int, float, float). a1/a2 are int converted to float via cvt.s.w; a3 is float passed in int-position $a3 (mtc1 $a3 -> $f12, swc1); arg5 is float on stack (lwc1). IDO -O2 folds last store into jr's delay slot. Lives in bootup_uso_tail.c (split file).
